name: DICEOMANCER
developer: 超厚皮猪猪 Ultra Piggy Studio
short_description: DICEOMANCER is a roguelike deck-building game. Though you long for a peaceful life, you're forced to embark on an adventure. In this world of swords, magic, and guns, make good use of your dice and deck to find a way back to tranquility! What can the dice be used for? To change... anything.
detailed_description:
You originally intended to go fishing, but find yourself caught in a dangerous battle. In this crisis, you gain a peculiar dice power - you can use it to change any number on the interface. Use this power to embark on an adventure!

Diverse Card Strategies

You will gradually unlock 6 types of mana, which can be combined to create 6 unique classes.

With nearly 500 cards and almost 200 relics, challenge enemies with your own deck!

Outrageous Dice Battles

What are dice used for? Many events and card effects require a D20 check - the dice determine your fate.

Moreover, some dice can be used to directly modify numbers! Change enemy HP, alter your own mana, modify card effects, adjust relic charges - you can use dice to change your destiny.

Unexpected Hand-painted Arts Throughout

The romance of 8 frames per second, a swan song of the hand-drawn era. There are over 10 sets of fully hand-drawn backgrounds, nearly 30 types of enemies, and close to 100 kinds of card effects.

Immerse yourself in this otherworldly journey from a first-person perspective!

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese
